suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for 'verification-only' features: when a feature requires only verification (no code changes needed), the commit should clearly document this and reference what was verified, rather than appearing to contain unrelated work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: linter-json-appendix-validation reviewer found commit cad2a1b contains m1-foundations validation files, not linter work. This was a round 1 blocking issue that is now resolved since the implementation is correct.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that ROLE-* referential integrity checking currently only validates screen.roleAccess[] in appendix, not prose body text (unlike SCREEN-* and STATE-* which have prose-level regex checking). This creates an inconsistency but may be intentional based on feature description wording.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: linter-role-referential-integrity reviewer noted ROLE-* prose mentions like 'requires ROLE-admin' in Entry Conditions are not validated

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update state type documentation to reflect actual schema.json (13 types including idle, scrollback, editing, search-active, streaming, refreshing, field-selected) rather than only the base 6 (loading, empty, error, success, offline, permission-denied)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: linter-sample-validation and linter-test-suite reviewers both noted AGENTS.md state types section doesn't match schema

notes.round1BlockingIssueResolved: The round 1 blocking issue (commit-feature mismatch for linter-json-appendix-validation) was re-examined. The linter JSON appendix validation code IS correctly implemented and working (verified: extractJsonAppendix() parses ```json blocks, validateJsonAppendix() validates against schema, sample files pass with exit code 0). The issue was a process/procedure issue where the commit was misattributed, not an implementation failure. The implementation fully satisfies VAL-LINT-001.
